mission.title: knative: Compatibility with Secret Store CSI Driver?
mission.description: Compatibility with Secret Store CSI Driver?. Requested by 8+ users.

steps.title: Check current knative deployment
steps.description:
Verify your knative version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
helm list -n knative 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working knative installation.

steps.title: Review knative configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative
```
Hello all,

I need to pull in a secret from a vault (a.k.a.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Compatibility with Secret Store CSI Driver?
steps.description:
This feature introduces support for Container Storage Interface (CSI) volumes in Knative Serving, enabling users to integrate with a wide variety of storage solutions through the Kubernetes CSI standard. This enhancement allows Knative services to leverage enterprise storage systems, cloud provider
```yaml
apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: seldon-request-logger
  metadata:
    labels:
    fluentd: "true"
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        autoscaling.knative.dev/minScale: "1"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: "secretsinvoker"
      containers:
      - image: docker.io/seldonio/seldon-request-logger:1.5.1
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        env:
          - name: ELASTICSEARCH_HOST
            value: "elasticsearch-opendistro-elasticsearch.logging.svc.cluster.local"
          - name: ELASTICSEARCH_PORT
            value: "9200"
      
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Compatibility with Secret Store CSI Driver?" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This feature introduces support for Container Storage Interface (CSI) volumes in Knative Serving, enabling users to integrate with a wide variety of storage solutions through the Kubernetes CSI standard.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible.
